body:
n.b. The following was generated via LLM from Git history. Only the contributor list has been verified.

# ONNX Runtime Release 1.26.0

## Announcement - Breaking Changes

- **Support for CUDA 12 will be removed in 1.27.0.**
  - CUDA 13 will continue to be published as `onnxruntime-<os>-<arch>-gpu_cuda13-<version>.<ext>`
- CUDA runtime will be moving soon to a dedicated Execution Provider (EP) instead of a published package from ORT core.

## Highlights

- Added optional memory mapping for `.ort` model loads ([#28164](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/28164)).
- Added RISC-V Vector (RVV) support for CPU EP ([#28261](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/28261)).
- OpenVINO EP upgraded for 1.26.0 development release ([#28297](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/28297)).
- WebGPU gained GridSample support ([#28264](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/28264)) and Split-K improvements ([#28151](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/28151)).
- CUDA plugin EP gained graph support ([#28002](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/28002)), profiling API ([#28216](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/28216)).

## Security and Reliability Hardening

- Replaced unrestricted Python `setattr` configuration with an allowlist ([#28083](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/28083)).
- Hardened multiple OOB and overflow scenarios across ML and core ops:
  - Attention mask index OOB write ([#27789](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27789)).
  - MaxPoolGrad indices bounds validation ([#27903](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27903)).
  - SVM and TreeEnsemble bounds/security fixes ([#27950](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27950), [#27951](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27951), [#27952](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27952), [#27989](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27989)).
  - RNN sequence_lens OOB read and integer overflow handling ([#28052](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/28052), [#28003](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/28003)).
  - GroupQueryAttention seqlens_k bounds validation and compatibility follow-up ([#28031](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/28031), [#28259](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/28259)).
  - MatMulBnb4 and ML coefficient SafeInt checks ([#27995](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27995), [#28001](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/28001)).
  - CUDA Gather int32 overflow fix ([#28108](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/28108)).
  - GridSample float->int64 cast hardening for NaN/Inf/out-of-range coords ([#28302](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/28302)).
- Fixed session logger use-after-free during EP teardown under verbose logging ([#28274](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/28274)).

## CUDA, Attention, and MLAS

- Filled CUDA opset/operator gaps and extended support:
  - Transpose opset 23 -> 25 ([#27740](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27740)).
  - QuantizeLinear/DequantizeLinear opset 25 ([#28046](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/28046)).
  - CUDA TopK INT8/INT16/UINT8 support ([#27862](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27862)).
  - LabelEncoder CUDA support for numeric types ([#28045](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/28045)).
- Attention/GQA improvements:
  - Fixed ONNX Attention min-bias alignment crash on SM<80 and masked-batch NaN behavior ([#27831](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27831)).
  - Added FP32 QK accumulation path for unfused GQA attention ([#28198](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/28198)).
  - Added CUDART_VERSION reduction compatibility in GQA attention ([#28296](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/28296)).
  - Fixed CUDA 13 build error in GQA unfused attention ([#28309](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/28309)).
  - PagedAttention fallback for SM<80 fp16 ([#28200](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/28200)).
- MLAS updates:
  - FP16 Gelu enablement ([#26815](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/26815)).
  - Arm64 BF16 fast-math conv kernels for NCHW/NCHWc paths ([#27878](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27878)).

## WebGPU, WebNN, and JavaScript

- WebGPU feature and correctness updates:
  - Added GridSample ([#28264](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/28264)).
  - Split-K support for batch size > 1 ([#28151](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/28151)).
  - MatMulNBits refactor and batching improvements ([#28109](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/28109), [#28197](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/28197)).
  - MHA correctness fix when present outputs are not requested ([#28027](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/28027)).
  - Buffer upload overflow fix ([#27948](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27948)).
  - Position ID bounds validation in WebGPU/JS RotaryEmbedding ([#28214](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/28214)).
- WebNN change:
  - Renamed pool2d property `roundingType` -> `outputShapeRounding` ([#28172](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/28172)).
- JavaScript ecosystem maintenance:
  - Multiple dependency bumps.

## Plugin EP and EP Ecosystem

- CUDA plugin EP:
  - Graph capture/replay support ported and expanded ([#27958](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27958), [#28002](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/28002)).
  - Sync support for IOBinding ([#27919](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27919)).
  - Profiling API implementation ([#28216](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/28216)).
  - Resource accounting integration ([#28028](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/28028)).
- WebGPU plugin EP:
  - Pipeline updates and API init error handling fixes ([#28121](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/28121), [#28211](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/28211)).
- Other EP updates:
  - CoreML: HardSigmoid and QuickGelu support; Pad reflect support/fixes ([#28182](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/28182), [#28184](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/28184), [#28073](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/28073), [#28062](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/28062)).
  - NvTensorRTRTX compatibility and diagnostics updates ([#28263](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/28263), [#27577](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27577)).
  - QNN file-mapping guard improvements ([#27871](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27871)).

## Contributors

[@tianleiwu](https://github.com/tianleiwu), [@yuslepukhin](https://github.com/yuslepukhin), [@edgchen1](https://github.com/edgchen1), [@vraspar](https://github.com/vraspar), [@hariharans29](https://github.com/hariharans29), [@skottmckay](https://github.com/skottmckay), [@eserscor](https://github.com/eserscor), [@xadupre](https://github.com/xadupre), [@sanaa-hamel-microsoft](https://github.com/sanaa-hamel-microsoft), [@claude](https://github.com/claude), [@elwhyjay](https://github.com/elwhyjay), [@Rishi-Dave](https://github.com/Rishi-Dave), [@titaiwangms](https://github.com/titaiwangms), [@adrianlizarraga](https://github.com/adrianlizarraga), [@jatinwadhwa921](https://github.com/jatinwadhwa921), [@jchen10](https://github.com/jchen10), [@Jiawei-Shao](https://github.com/Jiawei-Shao), [@maxwbuckley](https://github.com/maxwbuckley), [@preetha-intel](https://github.com/preetha-intel), [@qjia7](https://github.com/qjia7), [@qti-hungjuiw](https://github.com/qti-hungjuiw), [@RajeevSekar](https://github.com/RajeevSekar), [@umangb-09](https://github.com/umangb-09), [@adrastogi](https://github.com/adrastogi), [@akote123](https://github.com/akote123), [@amd-genmingz](https://github.com/amd-genmingz), [@ankitm3k](https://github.com/ankitm3k), [@apsonawane](https://github.com/apsonawane), [@bachelor-dou](https://github.com/bachelor-dou), [@baijumeswani](https://github.com/baijumeswani), [@bopeng1234](https://github.com/bopeng1234), [@chilo-ms](https://github.com/chilo-ms), [@chwarr](https://github.com/chwarr), [@Craigacp](https://github.com/Craigacp), [@dccarmo](https://github.com/dccarmo), [@derdeljan-msft](https://github.com/derdeljan-msft), [@ericcraw](https://github.com/ericcraw), [@fdwr](https://github.com/fdwr), [@fs-eire](https://github.com/fs-eire), [@gaugarg-nv](https://github.com/gaugarg-nv), [@gblong1](https://github.com/gblong1), [@GopalakrishnanN](https://github.com/GopalakrishnanN), [@Honry](https://github.com/Honry), [@intbf](https://github.com/intbf), [@ishwar-raut1](https://github.com/ishwar-raut1), [@Jaswanth51](https://github.com/Jaswanth51), [@javier-intel](https://github.com/javier-intel), [@JonathanC-ARM](https://github.com/JonathanC-ARM), [@julia-thorn](https://github.com/julia-thorn), [@justinchuby](https://github.com/justinchuby), [@jwludzik](https://github.com/jwludzik), [@Kevin-Taha](https://github.com/Kevin-Taha), [@Kotomi-Du](https://github.com/Kotomi-Du), [@MayureshV1](https://github.com/MayureshV1), [@mdvoretc-intel](https://github.com/mdvoretc-intel), [@miaobin](https://github.com/miaobin), [@milpuz01](https://github.com/milpuz01), [@mingyueliuh](https://github.com/mingyueliuh), [@mklimenk](https://github.com/mklimenk), [@n1harika](https://github.com/n1harika), [@prathikr](https://github.com/prathikr), [@psakhamoori](https://github.com/psakhamoori), [@qti-yuduo](https://github.com/qti-yuduo), [@quic-calvnguy](https://github.com/quic-calvnguy), [@RyanMetcalfeInt8](https://github.com/RyanMetcalfeInt8), [@sfatimar](https://github.com/sfatimar), [@sgbihu](https://github.com/sgbihu), [@ShirasawaSama](https://github.com/ShirasawaSama), [@ssam18](https://github.com/ssam18), [@susbhere](https://github.com/susbhere), [@sushraja-msft](https://github.com/sushraja-msft), [@TejalKhade28](https://github.com/TejalKhade28), name: ONNX Runtime v1.25.1
body:
n.b. This changelog is LLM generated. Only the contributor listing has been verified.

# ONNX Runtime Release 1.25.1

## 📢 Announcements & Breaking Changes

### ONNX Op Updates

*   **Enhanced ONNX operator support** with new opset versions: Reshape (opset 25), Transpose (opset 24) ([#27752](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27752))

---

## ✨ New Features

### 📊 New ONNX Ops & Model Support

*   **LinearAttention and CausalConvState operators** for Qwen3.5 model support ([#27907](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27907))
*   **RotaryEmbedding (RotEMB) and RMSNorm operators** added ([#27752](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27752))
*   **Linear Attention signature** support ([#27842](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27842))

---

## 🌐 Web & JavaScript

### WebGPU EP

*   **Qwen3.5 model support** on WebGPU execution provider ([#27996](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27996))
*   **QMoE 1-token decode path optimization** — fused operations to reduce GPU dispatches for improved performance ([#27998](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27998))

---

## 🐛 Bug Fixes

### Core Runtime Fixes

*   **Improved filesystem error messages** during Linux device discovery for better debugging experience ([#27289](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27289))
*   Fixed missing include for `SetRawDataInTensorProto` in NVIDIA TensorRT RTX tests ([#28065](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/28065))

---

## 🙏 Contributors

Thanks to our **7 contributors** for this release:
[@guschmue](https://github.com/guschmue), [@sanaa-hamel-microsoft](https://github.com/sanaa-hamel-microsoft), [@apsonawane](https://github.com/apsonawane), [@eserscor](https://github.com/eserscor), [@ishwar-raut1](https://github.com/ishwar-raut1), [@qjia7](https://github.com/qjia7), [@theHamsta](https://github.com/theHamsta)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/compare/v1.25.0...v1.25.1

name: ONNX Runtime v1.25.0
body:
## 📢 Announcements & Breaking Changes

### Build & Platform

*   **C++20 is now required** to build ONNX Runtime from source. Minimum toolchains: MSVC 19.29+, GCC 10+, Clang 10+. Users of prebuilt packages are unaffected. ([#27178](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27178))
*   **CUDA minimum version raised to 12.0** — CUDA 11.x is no longer supported. Users pinned to CUDA 11.x should stay on ORT 1.24.x or upgrade their CUDA toolkit/driver. ([#27570](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27570))
*   **ONNX upgraded to 1.21.0** ([#27601](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27601))
*   **sympy is now an optional dependency** for Python builds. ([#27200](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27200))

### Execution Provider Changes

*   **ArmNN EP has been removed.** Users should remove any `--use_armnn` build flags and migrate to the MLAS/KleidiAI-backed CPU EP or QNN EP for Qualcomm hardware. ([#27447](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27447))

### API Version

*   **ORT_API_VERSION** updated to **25**. ([#27280](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27280))

---

## 🔒 Security Fixes

*   Fixed **potential integer truncation leading to heap out-of-bounds read/write** ([#27544](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27544))
*   Addressed **Pad Reflect vulnerability** ([#27652](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27652))
*   **Security fix for transpose optimizer** ([#27555](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27555))
*   Upgraded minimatch 3.1.2 → 3.1.4 for **CVE-2026-27904** ([#27667](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27667))
*   Hardened shell command handling for constant strings ([#27840](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27840))
*   Added validation of `onnx::TensorProto` data size before allocation ([#27547](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27547))
*   Cleaned up external data path validation ([#27539](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27539))
*   Fixed misaligned address reads for tensor attributes from raw data buffers ([#27312](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27312))
*   Fixed **CPU Attention overflow** issue ([#27822](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27822))
*   Fixed **CPU LRN integer overflow** issues ([#27886](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27886))
*   Additional input validation hardening:
    *   Tile kernel dim overflow ([#27566](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27566))
    *   Out-of-bounds read in cross entropy ([#27568](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27568))
    *   TreeEnsembleClassifier attributes ([#27571](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27571))
    *   AffineGrid ([#27572](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27572))
    *   EmbedLayerNorm position_ids ([#27573](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27573))
    *   RotaryEmbedding position_ids ([#27597](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27597))
    *   RoiAlign batch_indices ([#27603](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27603))
    *   MaxUnpool indices ([#27432](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27432))
    *   QMoECPU swiglu OOB ([#27748](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27748))
    *   SVMClassifier initializer ([#27699](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27699))
    *   Col2Im SafeInt ([#27625](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27625))

---

## ✨ New Features

### 🔌 Execution Provider Plugin API & CUDA Plugin EP

ORT 1.25.0 introduces the **CUDA Plugin EP** — the first core implementation that enables third-party CUDA-backed EPs to be delivered as dynamically loaded plugins without rebuilding ORT.

*   **CUDA Plugin EP: Core implementation** ([#27816](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27816))
*   CUDA Plugin EP: BFC-style arena and CUDA mempool allocators for stream-aware memory management ([#27931](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27931))
*   Plugin EP Sync API for synchronous execution ([#27538](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27538))
*   Plugin EP event profiling APIs ([#27649](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27649))
*   Plugin EP APIs to retrieve ONNX operator schemas ([#27713](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27713))
*   Annotation-based graph partitioning with resource accounting ([#27595](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27595), [#27972](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27972))
*   EP API adapter improvements: header-only adapter, `OpKernelInfo::GetConfigOptions`, `LoggingManager::HasDefaultLogger()` ([#26879](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/26879), [#26919](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/26919), [#27540](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27540), [#27541](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27541), [#27587](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27587))
*   WebGPU EP made compatible with EP API ([#26907](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/26907))

### 🔧 Core APIs

*   **Per-session thread pool work callbacks API** ([#27253](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27253))
*   **`enable_profiling` in RunOptions** ([#26846](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/26846))
*   **KernelInfo string-array attribute APIs** for C and C++ ([#27599](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27599))
*   `OrtModel` input support for Compile API ([#27332](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27332))
*   Session config to create weightless EPContext models during compilation ([#27197](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27197))
*   Compiled model compatibility APIs in example plugin EP ([#27088](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27088))
*   **Model Package support (preview):** Initial infrastructure for automatically selecting compiled EPContext model variants from a packaged collection based on EP, device, and hardware constraints. The directory structure is not yet finalized. ([#27786](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27786))

### 📊 New ONNX Ops & Opset Coverage

*   **Attention opset 23** on CUDA with GQA, boolean masks, softcap, and softmax precision ([#26466](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/26466), [#27030](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27030), [#27082](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27082), [#27428](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27428), [#27714](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27714))
*   **Attention opset 24** on CUDA, disjoint from contrib op ([#27542](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27542)); nonpad KV seqlen on CPU ([#27384](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27384))
*   **TensorScatter-24** for CPU and CUDA ([#27389](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27389), [#27446](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27446))
*   **DeformConv** for CPU/CUDA ([#27393](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27393))
*   **LpNormalization-22** ([#27164](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27164))
*   CUDA opset gap fills:
    *   Control flow & misc: Flatten, Identity, If, Loop, Scan, ConstantOfShape, Size (opset 21/23) ([#27728](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27728))
    *   Pooling: GlobalAveragePool/GlobalMaxPool (→22) ([#27733](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27733))
    *   Shape ops: Shape (→25), Squeeze/Unsqueeze (→25) ([#27734](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27734), [#27739](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27739))
    *   TopK (→24, BF16) ([#27735](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27735)), GRU (→22) ([#27738](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27738))
    *   Pad (→25, wrap mode) ([#27774](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27774)), Resize v19 ([#27415](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27415)), RoiAlign v16/v22 ([#27646](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27646))

---

## 🖥️ Execution Provider Updates

### NVIDIA CUDA EP

*   **GQA with XQA and quantized KV cache**, including FP8 (E4M3) KV cache support ([#27246](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27246), [#27321](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27321))
*   **CUDA graph capture** compatibility for LLM ops and pre-compiled paths ([#27484](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27484), [#27477](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27477))
*   Volumetric (3-D) GridSample support ([#27201](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27201))
*   Optimized 3D nearest resize kernel for 5D tensors ([#27578](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27578))
*   Optional `router_weights` input to QMoE ([#27687](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27687))

### NVIDIA TensorRT RTX EP

*   D3D12 external resource import support ([#26948](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/26948))

### Qualcomm QNN EP

*   Disabled file mapping for embedded cache ([#27627](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27627))
*   Fixed use-after-free of logger object ([#27804](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27804))
*   Fixed wheel build issues on WSL and Linux SDK version propagation ([#27730](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27730), [#27800](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27800))

### Other EPs

*   **VitisAI EP:** Added PE version info to provider DLL ([#27626](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27626))
*   **DML EP:** Fixed overflow in DmlGraphFusionHelper::ProcessInputData ([#27815](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27815)), fixed new-delete mismatch in QuantizeLinear ([#27823](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27823))

---

## 🌐 Web & JavaScript

### WebGPU EP — Performance

*   Gemm/MatMul optimization using **subgroup features** ([#26433](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/26433))
*   MatMulNBits: 2-bit zero-point support ([#27285](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27285), [#27325](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27325)), higher K-parallelism ([#27834](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27834)), DP4A SmallM tiling ([#27910](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27910))
*   Flash Attention: head_sink support ([#27410](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27410)), configurable multi rotary cache concat offset ([#27434](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27434))
*   Optimized 4D Transpose ([#26942](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/26942)), string stream optimization ([#27223](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27223))

### WebGPU EP — New Op Support

*   Added **TopK** ([#27560](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27560)), **Softplus** ([#27457](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27457)), **Identity** ([#27067](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27067))
*   Added **Conv3D** support ([#27917](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27917)), **LpNorm** support ([#27876](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27876))
*   int64/bool support for Range, Expand, Flatten, Gather, Unsqueeze ([#26673](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/26673), [#27478](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27478), [#27561](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27561))
*   DequantizeLinear fixes ([#27706](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27706)), Einsum 5D tensor fixes ([#27779](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27779))

### WebGPU EP — Stability

*   Fixed device destroyed on session release breaking recreation ([#27634](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27634))
*   Fixed static destruction crash on exit ([#27470](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27470), [#27569](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27569))
*   **Backward compat:** Legacy WebGPU/WebNN memory info names are now accepted again ([#27637](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27637))
*   Deterministic Split-K handling ([#27086](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27086)), buffer segment alignment fix ([#27853](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27853))
*   Binary size reduction for WebAssembly builds ([#27370](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27370), [#27371](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27371))

### WebNN EP

*   Broader GQA support and improved MultiHeadAttention ([#27234](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27234), [#27494](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27494))
*   Added DepthToSpace support ([#27508](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27508))

### Node.js & React Native

*   Fixed **float16 tensor** support in Node.js and React Native ([#27327](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27327), [#27549](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27549))
*   Added **16KB page size alignment** for Android (required for Android 15+) ([#27523](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27523))

---

## 🧠 CPU & Core Optimizations

### MLAS / KleidiAI / Quantization

*   KleidiAI BF16 SME2 kernel integration ([#26773](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/26773)), asymmetric 4-bit MatMulNBits on ARM64 ([#27751](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27751))
*   Fused **Silu and Gelu kernels for AVX512** ([#27690](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27690))
*   Depthwise conv kernel for NCHW on AVX512 ([#27874](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27874))
*   ARM64 NCHWc NEON asm kernels ([#27099](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27099), [#27788](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27788)), BF16 KAI SBGemm on NCHWc ARM ([#27703](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27703))
*   POWER10 Sgemm PackA optimization ([#27575](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27575))
*   Improved pre-packing for 2-bit LUT kernels ([#27131](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27131))
*   Backend kernel selector config in MLAS, allowing users to opt out of KleidiAI kernels on ARM platforms 
([#27136](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27136))

### DQ→MatMulNBits Fusion

Extended to cover significantly more quantized LLM inference scenarios on CPU:

*   2-bit and 8-bit weights with Cast(fp16→fp32) patterns ([#27614](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27614))
*   FP16 models on CPU EP ([#27640](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27640)), fp16 8-bit on ARM64 ([#27692](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27692))
*   Gemm + per-tensor/per-channel quantization ([#27769](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27769))
*   FP16 quantized weight compatibility: models with HQNBIT quantized weights now route through the FP32 MLAS path for broader CPU compatibility ([#27820](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27820))

### Model Optimizer & Fusions

*   **Qwen3** model type support and RotaryEmbedding fusion for Qwen3 RoPE patterns ([#27556](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27556), [#27590](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27590))
*   **MobileClip** attention fusion for both attention block patterns ([#27883](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27883))
*   **Nemotron** speech conformer encoder MHA fusion ([#27764](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27764))
*   Fixed **GPT-2** no-past attention fusion for transformers ≥ 4.27 ([#27449](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27449))
*   Fixed **BART** attention fusion for SDPA pattern from transformers ≥ 4.49 ([#27458](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27458))
*   Pre-layer normalization support in attention fusion ([#27418](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27418))
*   SkipLayerNorm fusion with bias Add ([#27765](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27765)), broadcasting skip shapes ([#27489](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27489))
*   SpaceToDepth fusion pattern ([#27747](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27747))
*   NCHWc transformer: more patterns and ONNX-domain Gelu/HardSigmoid activations ([#27691](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27691), [#27821](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27821))
*   Optimized qMoE code path for single-token execution ([#27383](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27383))
*   ONNX Attention KV cache optimization with ConcatNewToPast ([#27613](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27613))

---

## 🔌 Language Bindings

### Python

*   Exposed `OrtDeviceVendorId` enum for vendor-aware `OrtDevice` aliases ([#27594](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27594))
*   Added bindings for `GetCompatibilityInfoFromModel` / `GetCompatibilityInfoFromModelBytes` ([#27565](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27565))
*   Fixed `OrtValue.from_dlpack` rejecting zero-size tensors as non-contiguous ([#27451](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27451))

### C#

*   Added bindings for `GetCompatibilityInfoFromModel` / `GetCompatibilityInfoFromModelBytes` ([#27565](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27565))

### Java

*   Avoid provider resource extraction when library already exists in `onnxruntime.native.path` ([#27668](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27668))

---

## 🐛 Bug Fixes

### Critical Fixes

*   Fixed **CPU Attention overflow** issue ([#27822](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27822))
*   Fixed **CPU LRN integer overflow** issues ([#27886](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27886))
*   Fixed incorrect pad indices in **AveragePool** `count_include_pad` computation — silent correctness issue ([#27375](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27375))
*   Fixed integer division/modulo by zero in CPU EP Div and Mod operators ([#27693](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27693), [#27833](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27833))
*   Fixed non-ASCII Unicode model path crash ([#27724](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27724))
*   Fixed arithmetic overflow in Det operator ([#27070](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27070))
*   Fixed narrow-to-wide string conversion bugs in DLL load error reporting ([#27777](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27777))

### Operator & Graph Fixes

*   Fixed 3D attention mask broadcasting in MHA ([#27464](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27464))
*   Fixed GQA shape inference for present outputs ([#27250](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27250))
*   Fixed Einsum bugs for reduction and empty input cases ([#27225](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27225), [#27226](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27226))
*   Prevented cross-EP Cast fusion in `RemoveDuplicateCastTransformer` ([#27363](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27363))
*   Fixed ConvTranspose bias input validation on CPU/CUDA ([#27209](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27209))
*   Fixed Cast node naming collisions in float16 conversion ([#27469](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27469))
*   Fixed concat/slice elimination and unsqueeze elimination against optional attrs and invalid models ([#27638](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27638))
*   Improved EPContext error message when node is not assigned to an EP ([#27474](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27474))

### EP-Specific Fixes

*   Fixed MiGraphX EP double allocation ([#27551](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27551))
*   Fixed MLAS qgemm dispatch and kernel regressions in quantized conv tests ([#27671](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27671))
*   Fixed run-level profiling for subgraph operators ([#27870](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27870))
*   Fixed `--build_wasm_static_lib` implicitly enabling `--build_wasm` ([#27342](https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/pull/27342))
